name: Ginger Salmon Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Squeeze 1 1/2 Tbsp juice from lemon into a small jar.
2. Add 1/2 tsp grated fresh ginger, 3/4 tsp salt, and 1/4 tsp pepper to the jar. Shake until salt dissolves.
3. Add 5 Tbsp oil, shake to combine.
4. Remove tough stems from watercress; divide leaves among 4 plates.
5. In a large bowl, beat egg.
6. Drain canned salmon, add it to the egg with remaining ginger, scallion, parsley, 1/2 cup bread crumbs, 1/2 tsp salt, and 1/4 tsp pepper. Mix well and shape into 8 patties.
7. Heat remaining oil in a large non-stick frying pan over medium heat.
8. Coat patties with remaining breadcrumbs.
9. Cook until golden brown on both sides, about 3 to 5 minutes.
